spec.doc: StarTrack Label Specifications - Modify Your Own System (MOS) v9

rules.title: Express receiver location codes
rules.description: Express and Special Services labels print RC=AU, R1 blank and R2 = Nearest Depot from the Location Master File. The depot cannot be validated without the LMF, so confirm it on the preview.

messages.pass: Routing depot segment present: {actual}. Confirm it matches the Nearest Depot for the receiver postcode in the Location Master File.
messages.missing: Routing depot segment was not decoded. Confirm RC/R1/R2 values on the preview.
